svg.title: <size:18>Online Shopping System - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)</size>

g.text: Online Shopping System - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "Customer registers, searches product, adds to cart, places order, pays, tracks delivery."
"We traced a full journey: register -> search
-> decorate (gift wrap) -> cart -> order -> state transitions
State, Observer, Strategy. Each solves a real problem."
Places order, stock validated, Order created
On state change, email/push observers notified
